title: Many-to-Many Relationships Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Many-to-Many database relationships.

questions.question: Which of these is a perfect example of a Many-to-Many (M:N) relationship?
options: A Store and its many Customers
Students and the Courses they take
A Country and its Capital city

questions.question: What is the name of the third table used to model a many-to-many relationship in a SQL database?
In Sequelize, which association method is used to set up a Many-to-Many relationship?
What is the most common way to model M:N relationships in NoSQL databases like MongoDB?
options: Storing an array of IDs in both related documents

questions.question: Which of these describes a student with multiple courses and a course with multiple students?
